article.title: ETH crash to $1K looms if key support breaks: Will futures traders step in?
article.summary: Ether’s futures open interest fell by 25%, putting pressure on the $1,500 support level. Is a drop to $1,000 next?

headline: Solana CEO Urges CLARITY Act Shield for $10B Devs

article.title: Solana Institute CEO says CLARITY Act must shield open-source developers
article.summary: Kristin Smith urged the Senate to preserve developer protections in the CLARITY Act, arguing open-source builders should not be regulated as financial intermediaries.

headline: China Zinc Margins Collapse to Record 5-Year Lows

article.title: China’s Zinc Margins Crushed as Fees Plunge to Record Lows
article.summary: Chinese zinc smelters are being tested by a worsening feedstock shortage that has driven processing fees to historic lows and wiped out profits.

headline: Morgan Stanley Sees 10% Aussie Property Price Plunge

article.title: Morgan Stanley Australia CEO on Property Market Outlook
article.summary: Richard Wagner, CEO of Morgan Stanley Australia, said auction clearance rates and other metrics are "quite alarming," which may suggest a downward pressure for pockets of the property market. He spoke to Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: EU Fines Meta $1B Over WhatsApp Chatbot Access
